content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — Rating-gating dark pattern: custom star UI routes ≥4-star users to a direct write-review URL (`itms-apps://...action=write-review`, RatingGateView.swift:19) while diverting unhappy users to private feedback (line 22), plus "rate us 5 stars!" solicitation in metadata (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1); no `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview` usage found.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits filtering users by sentiment before sending them to the App Store, as it manipulates rating averages and misleads customers. The pre-screening star gate combined with a direct write-review deep link bypasses the sanctioned `requestReview` API, and the description's "rate us 5 stars" ask compounds the risk. Replace the gate with `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` (or `AppStore.requestReview`) shown unconditionally, and remove the 5-star solicitation from the metadata.
